title: Fix Jungle Saplings
description: Fixes Jungle Saplings drop rates to match other trees.
body:
# Fix Jungle Saplings

[![Modrinth Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fix-jungle-saplings) [![GitHub Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/ferdinandkeller/fix-jungle-saplings)

This mod fixes a vanilla Minecraft bug where jungle leaves drop saplings at much lower rates than intended.

Now Jungle saplings drop at the same rate as other tree types, making it much simpler to sustainably grow jungle trees.

## Experience in-game

_Here is a Jungle Tree we want to mine_
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ba069dc6ccbb128c550bd31d99f159a11788d79.jpeg)

_Here is the number of saplings we got (9 instead of 2 or 3)_
![Result](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ed1c3f28cc519f9ae0e2b3b68d6f8a55ce32d7.jpeg)
